articles.title: Eyes On $50,000: Bitcoin Poised For Major Rally Amid Spot ETF Optimism – Analyst
articles.description: Crypto analyst Michael van de Poppe has recently shared his latest Bitcoin price prediction on X. In a recent post, the analyst expressed confidence that Bitcoin has concluded its corrective phase and is primed to test the $47,000-$50,000 range soon. Van de Poppe’s optimism stems from a critical market...

articles.title: Solana Makes History; Flips Ethereum on DEX 24-Hour Trading Volume
articles.description: Cryptocurrency expert Lark Davis shared in an analysis on X (formerly Twitter) that Solana has flipped Ethereum on another metric in its recent resurgence. The analyst mentioned that the Layer-1 blockchain surpassed Ethereum in the 24-hour volume registered on decentralized exchanges. According to Davis, the flip is the first of its kind in the network’s […]

articles.title: Solana Wins Institutional Investors’ Trust Over Bitcoin And Ethereum, Here’s How
articles.description: Solana is in the lead again, as the majority of crypto assets investment products witnessed net outflows of investments last week, bringing an end to 11 consecutive weeks of inflows. articles.title: BlackRock bows to SEC pressure on Bitcoin ETF cash creations model
articles.description: Investment management giant BlackRock filed an amended S-1 with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) today for its proposed spot Bitcoin exchange-traded fund (ETF), bowing to pressure from regulators regarding the fund's creation and redemption model.ETFs can keep their share prices aligned with the underlying asset (BTC) by creating or redeeming shares in-kind, exchanging Bitcoin for...
